scope: Issue #165 metadata refresh: all 149 operations from the official Intercom OpenAPI 2.14 document are enumerated. The five pre-existing stream-backed collection reads remain executable; every other operation is blocked by default as direct_read, binary_read, sensitive/admin reverse-ETL, destructive action, or duplicate metadata for follow-up lanes #168-#171. No raw generic HTTP write or credentialed live check is exposed by this metadata.
